channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Banks can now pay visa bonds for applicants
item.description:
Importance: 83.8 | Covered by: 8 feeds | Reputation: 7.5

Matched titles:
- BB allows forex security bonds for visas
- Banks allowed to send money abroad for visa bond
- BB eases visa bond payments abroad
- Bangladesh Bank allows remittance of visa bond funds abroad
- Bangladesh Bank permits remittance of ‘Visa Bonds’ and Security Deposits abroad
- Bangladesh Bank permits remittance of ‘visa bonds’ and security deposits abroad
- BB allows foreign currency release for visa bonds, security deposits
